fieldguide.entity.creeperoverhaul.mushro:
A peaceful Creeper, native to the vast mushroom fields.

It is squishy to the touch.
fieldguide.entity.creeperoverhaul.swamp_:
A hostile Creeper, adapted to dense swamps. 

Nearby witches have decorated it with stark bone mask.
fieldguide.entity.creeperoverhaul.bamboo:
A neutral Creeper, adapted to blend into the bamboo forests. 

It can no longer explode, instead it brings down it's lanky body to strike foes...

...It is terrified of Pandas.
fieldguide.entity.creeperoverhaul.badlan:
A hostile Creeper adapted to the Badlands.

It's big, immune to knockback, and has a very cute cactus on its head that could be sheared off.
fieldguide.entity.creeperoverhaul.spruce:
A hostile Creeper, adapted to stony moss and podzol. 

It has adapted to appear like a stump breaking through a rock.
fieldguide.entity.creeperoverhaul.ocean_:
A hostile Creeper with gills instead of lungs.

They do not explode, instead opting to fire small poisoned spines at foes. Don't get too close!
fieldguide.entity.creeperoverhaul.birch_:
A hostile Creeper that blends into Birch Forests. 

It creeps and stalks, but will explode when it reaches you.
fieldguide.entity.creeperoverhaul.dark_o:
A hostile Creeper, adapted to the low light of Dark Forests. 

When it explodes, it releases a thick fog that blinds nearby mobs.
fieldguide.entity.creeperoverhaul.snowy_:
A neutral Creeper with thick fur useful in the cold biomes. 

When threatened, it will headbutt threats like an angry goat.
fieldguide.entity.creeperoverhaul.hills_:
A neutral Creeper, adapted to mountaintops. 

It's much more tough than a normal Creeper, almost as if carved from mountain rock.
fieldguide.entity.creeperoverhaul.beach_:
A hostile Creeper washed ashore on a beach, covered in sand and seashells.

It's frail, but it's explosions pack a punch!
fieldguide.entity.creeperoverhaul.desert:
A hostile Creeper adapted to the Desert sands.

It has a very cute cactus on its head that could be shorn off.
fieldguide.entity.creeperoverhaul.savann:
A neutral Creeper, adapted to the arid Savannah. 

It can no longer explode, instead using it's mobile parts to bludgeon attackers.
fieldguide.entity.creeperoverhaul.cave_c:
A hostile Creeper, adapted dark caves. 

It's slightly more tough than a normal Creeper, and it's skin feels like gravel.
fieldguide.entity.creeperoverhaul.jungle:
A hostile Creeper, adapted to dense Jungle. 

It is covered in thick foliage, and has become more stout than a normal Creeper.
fieldguide.entity.creeperoverhaul.dripst:
A hostile Creeper, adapted to moist dripstone caverns. 

It's more brittle than a standard Creeper, and feels odd to the touch.
